arts.ttl: Matchday Quiz: Test your Palace v Ipswich knowledge!
arts.sum: Crystal Palace takes on Ipswich Town at Selhurst Park this Saturday afternoon (15:00 GMT) – so before kick-off, put your knowledge to the test with our weekly matchday quiz!

arts.ttl: The Key Quotes from Oliver Glasner’s pre-Ipswich press conference
arts.sum: Ahead of Palace’s single Premier League game in March against Ipswich Town (Saturday, 8th March, 15:00 GMT), manager Oliver Glasner faced the media and gave an update on the squad’s approach and mentality with a big gap between games.

arts.ttl: Eddie the Eagle can fly v Ipswich - FPL tips & team of the week
arts.sum: With question marks around many of the top strikers this week, why not take a flyer on the likes of Eddie Nketiah and Beto, asks Thomas Woods.

arts.ttl: Millwall goalkeeper breaks silence on ban and reveals private Jean-Philippe Mateta gesture
arts.sum: Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts has been handed an extended six game ban following the challenge which injured Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta last weekend

arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Ipswich Town injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Mateta hopefully back at end of month - Glasner
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner says Jean-Philippe Mateta is "recovering well" from his head injury and will hopefully be fit to face Fulham on 29 March.

arts.ttl: Liam Roberts: Millwall goalkeeper hit with six-match ban for Jean-Philippe Mateta challenge
arts.sum: An independent regulatory commission upheld the FA’s appeal to increase suspension from three matches

arts.ttl: Glasner reveals Mateta return date from 'huge wound'
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta is recovering well from the "huge wound" he sustained against Millwall in the FA Cup and is expected to return for Crystal Palace's FA Cup quarter-final with Fulham at the end of March, says Eagles boss Oliver Glasner.

arts.ttl: Glasner gives Mateta & team news update pre-Ipswich
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Jean-Philippe Mateta is recovering well from the injury he sustained against Millwall last weekend.

arts.ttl: Sporting director already in transfer talks to sign Crystal Palace player this summer
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Fenerbahce are the latest Super Lig club to show interest in Crystal Palace defender Tyrick Mitchell. The left back has previously been linked with a move to Galatasaray, but their local rivals are looking to get ahead of them in the race to sign the Eagles player. The post Sporting director already in transfer talks to sign Crystal Palace player this summer appeared first on Sport Witness.
